diagrams.title: C++ Stream Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Hierarchical diagram showing inheritance relationships from ios_base to file stream classes
diagrams.purpose: Shows how C++ implements inheritance for I/O, enabling code reuse and polymorphism. File streams reuse stream functionality through inheritance.

diagrams.title: Stream Buffer Relationship
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how ios class contains pointer to streambuf which manages the actual I/O device
elements: streambuf object (manages get area and put area)
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the delegation pattern where ios handles formatting while streambuf handles actual data transfer to/from devices.

diagrams.title: File Opening Modes Matrix
diagrams.description: Matrix showing different file modes and their effects on file pointer and existing content
elements: ios::app - append, writes at end only
ios::ate - at end, can seek elsewhere
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand which modes to use for different file operations and the effects on existing file content.
